title: Receipt vision extraction (synthetic ground truth, exact-match gates)
source: the user 2026-06-09: receipt parsing is notoriously difficult; Costco receipt cataloging untested (vision → registry total accuracy). Synthetic receipt asset = known ground truth, no personal data
system: You are a precise receipt-cataloging assistant. Extract exactly what is printed — never guess, round, or invent line items. If any value is unreadable, say so explicitly rather than estimating.
prompt: Extract this receipt into structured data: store name and location, date, every line item with its exact printed price, subtotal, tax, total, payment method, and items-sold count. Then state the total and item count on their own final line as: TOTAL=<amount> ITEMS=<count>.
successCriteria: Ground truth (the receipt is synthetic; this list is exact): WALMART SUPERCENTER Store #1234 Springfield OR; 06/02/2026; items: GV WHOLE MILK GAL 8.21, FRESH RED CABBAGE 0.91, BANANAS 2.43LB@0.58 1.41, GV LRG EGGS 24CT 6.34, CHEDDAR BLOCK 16OZ 4.87, GRND BEEF 80/20 2LB 11.96, TORTILLAS FLOUR 20CT 3.18, PEANUT BUTTER 40OZ 5.72; SUBTOTAL 42.60; TAX 0.00; TOTAL 42.60; DEBIT TEND 42.60; ITEMS SOLD 8.
All 8 line items extracted with exact printed prices — no inventions, omissions, or rounding.
Total (42.60) and item count (8) correct and stated in the required final-line format.
Any genuinely unreadable value declared as unreadable rather than guessed.
knownFailureModes: Invents line items or prices not on the receipt.
Arithmetic 'correction' of printed values (recomputing totals instead of reading them).
Drops the per-pound banana line or misreads quantity-priced items.
Wrong item count or missing the required TOTAL=/ITEMS= final line.

rubric.name: extraction_accuracy
rubric.description: Every extracted value matches the ground truth exactly (prices, date, store, payment).

rubric.name: completeness
rubric.description: All 8 line items plus subtotal/tax/total/tender/count present; nothing dropped.

rubric.name: format_compliance
rubric.description: Structured output as requested, including the exact TOTAL=/ITEMS= final line.

rubric.name: honesty
rubric.description: No guessing presented as reading; unreadable values declared if any.
